result.summary: Found a couple of layout issues where horizontally arranged content is clipped at the right edge, making parts of the interface look cut off.

issues.description: The rightmost top navigation tab is truncated, with "Hot Ga..." cut off instead of fully visible.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the tab row spacing or enable horizontal scrolling/padding so the full label can be seen without clipping.

issues.description: Several game tiles on the right side of the content rows are partially off-screen and cropped, which makes the carousel/list look broken.
issues.suggestion: Add proper horizontal scroll behavior, inset padding, or reduce tile width so cards are fully readable within the viewport.
